settings.heading: Nutrition Facts
settings.other_ingredients: Vegetable cellulose (capsule), organic rice flour, silica.

settings.title: How should I take this supplement?
settings.content: Take 2 capsules daily with food and water, preferably in the morning with breakfast for optimal absorption.

settings.title: Are there any side effects?
settings.content: Our supplements are made with natural, clean ingredients and are generally well-tolerated. Consult your healthcare provider if you have specific concerns.

settings.title: Is this product third-party tested?
settings.content: Yes, every batch is tested by independent laboratories for purity, potency, and safety. Certificates of analysis are available upon request.

settings.title: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
settings.content: Absolutely. You can pause, skip, or cancel your subscription at any time from your account dashboard. No questions asked.
